structured_payload_candidate.title: Dynamic Glazing Orientation Applicability
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Dynamic glazing is most feasible on large glazing facades not facing north, working well on east and west orientations, and can be used efficiently on unshaded south facades.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Unglazed Solar Collector Installed Capacity in North America
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In North America, swimming pool heating dominates with an installed capacity of about 55 × 10^9 Btu/h (16 GWth) of unglazed plastic collectors.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Solar Combisystem Components
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A typical solar combisystem installation for combined DHW and space heating includes solar collectors, a heat storage tank, and a boiler as auxiliary heater.
